analysis.summary: The remote support session recording displays a completely black screen for its entire duration. While the mouse cursor is intermittently visible and active, no applications, desktop environment, or any other visual content related to IT support work is captured. Consequently, no specific IT support actions are visible in this recording.
actions_taken: No IT support actions are visible in this recording due to the persistent black screen.
issues_observed: The remote desktop environment was not visible throughout the entire recording, displaying only a black screen. This issue prevents any assessment of the IT support work performed.
notable_events: The entire 59-second recording shows a black screen, with only the mouse cursor appearing and moving intermittently. This is a critical failure of the recording to capture the remote session's content.
concerns: The recording completely lacks visual evidence of any performed work, which poses a significant quality and potential compliance concern for auditing the support session. It is impossible to verify what actions, if any, were taken by the technician.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician's efficiency cannot be assessed due to the absence of visible desktop content or applications. Mouse movements are present throughout the recording, suggesting active engagement from the technician, but no productive work is displayed.
coaching_flags: Investigate why the ScreenConnect recording failed to capture the remote desktop content, as the entire session shows only a black screen with intermittent mouse cursor activity, rendering the recording useless for audit or review of performed work. This might indicate a display driver issue on the client, or a recording system malfunction.
